description:
Create a Talon Python module and command file in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\fbi_tools\ that searches a local JSON file at C:\workspace\data\fbi_wanted.json for FBI Wanted persons and inserts a formatted summary.

The Python implementation (fbi_search.py) must include a Talon action user.insert_fugitive_record(search_term: str) that performs a case-insensitive substring search on the 'title' field within the 'items' array of the JSON file. If a record is found, the action should insert a summary using the following format:
SUBJECT: [title]
ALIASES: [comma-separated aliases OR 'None' if null/empty]
WARNING: [warning_message OR 'None' if null/empty]

If no match is found, it should insert: "NO RECORD FOUND FOR: [search_term]".

The associated Talon file (fbi_search.talon) must define a global voice command "fugitive search <user.text>:" that passes the dictated text to the user.insert_fugitive_record action.
